stemHtml: In a remote indicating compass system the amount of deviation caused by aircraft magnetism and electrical circuits may be minimised by…

options.a: using a vertically mounted gyroscope instead of a horizontally mounted one.
options.b: positioning the gyroscope in the centre of the aircraft.
options.c: mounting the detector unit (flux valve) in the nose.
options.d: mounting the detector unit (flux valve) in the wingtip.
